application.doc: A collection of operations for accessing the Register of Charities data.

resource.doc: Returns sector data split by income category.
Returns an overview of the sector.
Returns all top ten lists from the sector data.
Gets the last 5 years financial history for a charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns a specified list of top 10 charities from the sector data.

param.name: listType
param.doc: The type of list to be views

resource.doc: Gets a charity's most recent assets and liabilities figures.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets details of a CIO dissolution.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Search for charities by their registered number.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets a charity's governing document details.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets main details about multiple charities.

param.name: RegisteredNumbers
param.doc: The registration numbers of the charities. Comma separated list

resource.doc: Whether a charity's primary purpose is grant making.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns sector data split by income bands.
Gets all of a charity's classification details.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets main details about a charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns the names of a charity's trustees.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Search for charities by their name.

param.name: charityname
param.doc: Charity name search term

resource.doc: Gets simple governance details.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets the name of the constituency in which the charity's public contact is based.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets details of a charity's trustees and other charities they are linked to.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Search for charities by their register removal date.

param.name: startDate
param.doc: The earliest removal date of range to be searched in the format YYYY-MM-DD

param.name: endDate
param.doc: The latest removal date of range to be searched in the format YYYY-MM-DD

resource.doc: Search for charities by their registration date.

param.name: startDate
param.doc: Earliest registration date of range to search in the format YYYY-MM-DD

param.name: endDate
param.doc: Latest registration date of range to search in the format YYYY-MM-DD

resource.doc: Gets the contact details for a charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns details of published reports on a charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets all of a charity's areas of operation.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets region level information about a charity's area of operation.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets the registration history of a charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets local authority level information about a charity's area of operation.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns a list of policies the charity has in place.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets continent and country level information about a charity's area of operation.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns information from a charity's most recently submitted Annual Return.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets extended main details about a charity including trustees, classifications and areas of operation.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Returns a list of other organisations the charity is regulated by.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets a charity's AR and Accounts submission details.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets other names the charity is or has been known by.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Get details of all charities linked to a main charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Get details of a specific linked charity.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets extended main details about a charity including trustees, classifications and areas of operation.

param.name: RegisteredNumber
param.doc: The registration number of the charity

param.name: suffix
param.doc: The subsidiary or linked charity number

resource.doc: Gets details of a charity's trustees and other charities they are linked to.
